results.title: 10 Ways to Fast Track Your Customer Complaints Management - isoTracker
results.content:
Tracking mentions of your company on social media platforms is a pro-active way to spot issues before they go viral and become bigger and harder to resolve. Track products, brands and all terms related to your company, and unify your call centre to your social presence and other contact channels for better customer communication options.

### 7. Identify and categorise customers making the complaints.

By organising complaints according to each customer, you will have a clearer history and better ability to assist. An automated customer complaints management software tool is a great way to make this simpler.

### 8. Automate acknowledgement responses. [...] Skip to content

# 10 Ways to Fast Track Your Customer Complaints Management

customer complaints

results.title: Customer Complaint Tracking: A Guide To Current Best Practices
results.content:
•  Send automated alerts and reminders to team members  
•  Create custom workflows for certain case types  
•  View the status and progress of all cases and tasks  
•  Set up dashboards that allow you to track complaints according to type  
•  Manage any documentation attached to a specific complaint.

They also require user-input, which means it’s all but impossible to track the progress of customer complaints in real time. For these reasons, most organisations should look to implement a proper complaint handling system – designed to significantly reduce the burdens associated with managing customer complaints. [...] On the tools front, it may mean investing in dedicated complaints management software that allows you to track and manage complaints from numerous sources.

The specifics will depend on the structure of your organisation and the expertise on your team so try to think critically about what you really need to track complaints properly – and invest in tools or training that’s likely to drive tangible improvements.

### 6. Publish Your Process

Unless you operate in a highly-regulated industry, there’s probably no (legal) requirement to publish your complaint handling process. That said, this is a recommended best practice for a reason.

Namely that it encourages dissatisfied customers to complain (instead of simply disengaging with your organisation) and improves transparency. [...] Ombudsmen and other regulators will also expose underperforming companies in publicly-available reports like the Housing Ombudsman Service’s Annual Review Of  Customer Complaints.

## A Healthy Complaints Tracking Process Protects Your Organisation

Penalties may be less severe in industries that don’t experience this level of regulation. But the fact remains that there are serious reputational and financial consequences for neglecting your complaint tracking process.

The question is, what is the best way to collect, track and action customer complaints? How are you meant to turn disparate and poorly-organised customer feedback into operationally-relevant data that can be used to improve your services?

results.title: Going is rated "Excellent" with 4.5 / 5 on Trustpilot
results.content:
Reply from Going

Apr 29, 2026

Hi Hasan,

Thanks for reaching out about this - we're sorry to hear about the frustrating experience. When a member continues to be billed after canceling their paid membership, this is typically an indication that they may have unintentionally signed up for another memebrship using a different email address, such as an alternate email for work or school.

Our team would be more than happy to look in to this for you. If you reach out to support@going.com, we'll be able to further assist 🙂

The Going Team

MR

Mayra Ramallo US•2 reviews

Apr 22, 2026

Image 61: Rated 5 out of 5 stars

Verified

## This App is breaking barriers
This App is breaking barriers. As a frequent traveler I was hesitant but once I tried, I was pretty satisfied!

April 22, 2026 [...] Evaluating 104 reviews, reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the exceptional customer service, highlighting the professionalism, knowledge, and promptness of the agents, who often go above and beyond to assist. Many people appreciate the significant savings on flights, with some reporting hundreds or even thousands of dollars saved on int ernational and domestic trips, making travel more accessible and frequent. The deals, including mistake fares and holiday options, are frequently described as legitimate, accurate, and life-changing, enabling customers to explore the world without overpaying. However, some customers expressed dissatisfaction with the subscription process, encountering issues with multiple accounts or difficulty [...] ### Join Going for _free_ and save hundreds on airfare.

Image 11
“We just returned from Cape Town, South Africa, thanks to $600 roundtrip flights! Adopting the Going travel philosophy of prioritizing price first, rather than date/destination, has been a game-changer. With open minds and our Going subscription, we’ve been places we never thought possible.”

- Brianne & Chris V.

Going keeps a close eye on airfare to over 900 destinations around the world. When the prices drop, you know.

results.title: Rail Ombudsman
results.content:
Accessibility

0330 094 0362Email: info@railombudsman.org

Hero Background

## To get started, click our ‘Complain’ button below.

We offer a free, expert service to help sort out unresolved customer complaints about Service Providers within the rail industry. If you prefer, you can fill out a paper application form and send it back to us by email or post.Download a copy here or contact us if you need us to send the form to you or to raise a complaint via other accessible channels.

Complain

To learn more, please visit ourFAQs and Resources

# Welcome to the Rail Ombudsman

The Rail Ombudsman is an independent, not-for-profit organisation. [...] Our vision is to inspire customer confidence and to deliver our service fairly to ensure the right outcome in every case. We also support the rail industry to raise standards.

More about us

High-speed train

## Our process

1 Submit1 Submit

2 Assessment2 Assessment

3 Response3 Response

4 Review4 Review

5 Resolution5 Resolution

6 Outcome6 Outcome

\ Please allow the Service Provider 40 working days to resolve your complaint unless you receive a final response, sometimes called a deadlock letter, sooner.

## Frequently Asked Questions

More FAQs

## Now that you know more, are you ready to raise your complaint with us?
